title: setaria retiglumis
intro: Setaria retiglumis, also known as purple false brome, is a type of grass native to Africa. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, headaches, and gastrointestinal problems, offering benefits such as pain relief and improved digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Setaria retiglumis can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
